scripts.build:wasm: emcc src/wasm/h265_parser.cpp -o public/h265_parser.js -s WASM=1 -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORT_ES6=1 -s ENVIRONMENT=web -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -s MAXIMUM_MEMORY=4GB -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=["_malloc","_free","_parse_nalu"] -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=["ccall","cwrap","getValue","setValue","HEAPU8"] -O3 -std=c++17
